title: Docker & Deployment Quiz
description: Test your Docker and cloud deployment knowledge.

questions.question: What is the difference between a Docker image and a Docker container?

options.text: An image is a read-only blueprint; a container is a running instance of that image
Images run on the cloud; containers run locally
Containers are bigger versions of images

questions.question: What is the advantage of multi-stage Docker builds?

options.text: They enable running multiple applications in one container
They produce smaller production images by excluding build tools and dev dependencies
They speed up the Docker build process
They allow the app to run on multiple operating systems simultaneously
Starts all services defined in docker-compose.yml in detached (background) mode
